title: tanacetum chiliophyllum
intro: Tanacetum chiliophyllum, also known as tansy chrysanthemum or Chiliophyllum, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and fern-like foliage. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Tanacetum chiliophyllum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and support for the immune system, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum chiliophyllum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
